overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character riding a horse alongside a walking companion through a rural farmstead at night. The scene features traditional wooden architecture, fenced pastures, and atmospheric lantern lighting as the characters travel from a fenced path through a farm and into open countryside.

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at walking pace along a fenced path, following a companion who walks ahead with a lantern

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead holding a lantern to light the path

entered.detail: white painted wooden rail fence running along the left side of the path
white painted wooden rail fence running along the right side of the path
large stack of rectangular hay bales wrapped in white material
large wooden barn structure with open entrance and warm interior lighting
two-story wooden farmhouse with illuminated windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark night with the camera following a horse rider along a narrow dirt path flanked by white wooden fences. A companion walks ahead carrying a lantern that casts a warm glow on the path. In the distance, a farm house with lit windows is visible, while a large wooden barn and stacks of hay bales line the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmstead courtyard with house and outbuildings

events.description: passing from fenced path into open farmyard area around the main house
horse slows and turns slightly left to navigate around farm buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating the horse through the farmstead, passing close to the main house and outbuildings while following the lantern-bearing companion

notable_agents.action: white horse standing near a wooden cart, grazing or waiting

entered.detail: fence made of wooden posts and stacked stones
large grey rock boulder situated near the farmhouse
small weathered wooden shed or lean-to structure
old wooden wagon or cart parked near the shack

segments.scene_description: The riders enter the farm proper, passing the hay bales and approaching the main farmhouse which now dominates the left side of the frame. They navigate around stone fences, a large rock, and outbuildings including a small shack and wooden cart. A white horse stands near the cart as the riders continue past the warmly lit house.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy hillside with scattered oak trees

events.description: exiting the farmstead and entering open countryside with rolling hills

agents.ego_description: riding uphill away from the farm, following the companion into open terrain with scattered trees

notable_agents.action: companion walking steadily up the grassy hill ahead with lantern

entered.detail: large oak trees scattered across the rolling grassy hills
open grass-covered terrain sloping upward into the distance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the farm buildings behind, the riders ascend a grassy hillside into open country. The fenced enclosures and structures fade into the distance as they follow a narrow path through rolling terrain dotted with scattered oak trees. The lantern light continues to illuminate the path ahead as they climb the slope under the dark cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, lantern-lit farmstead path into the expansive darkness of the open countryside. It begins by trailing a horse rider and a companion along a narrow dirt path flanked by white wooden fences, with a distant farmhouse and hay bales emerging through the night. As the camera moves deeper into the farm, the scene shifts to navigate around stone fences, a wooden cart, and the warmly lit main house that now dominates the frame. The environment then opens up as the riders leave the buildings behind, ascending a grassy hillside where the fenced enclosures fade into the distance. Finally, the camera follows the party along a narrow trail through rolling terrain dotted with oak trees under a dark, cloudy sky.
